refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall execute the load-travel-dump cycle within the p95 cycle time target (CT_target) while maintaining safety constraints.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR was a high-level KPI; refinement adds the specific statistical threshold (p95) and the operational context (safety constraints) to ensure measurability.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Simulated and field-based duty cycle testing with 100+ iterations to calculate p95 cycle time against CT_target.
sub_frs: FR-1: Minimize load-time variance through automated bucket positioning.
FR-2: Optimize travel speed based on terrain and payload data.
FR-3: Reduce dump-cycle latency via precision spotting.

candidate_dps: Manual operator training and site optimization
Autonomous Path Planning and Motion Control System
selected_dp.selected_dp: Autonomous Path Planning and Motion Control System

potential_sources: Network latency affecting real-time path updates
coupling_check.notes: The DP is logically decoupled from the safety service logic, though it must consume safety stop signals.

assumptions_risks: Risk: Dynamic obstacles may cause frequent path recalculations, increasing cycle time.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Ensure the DP explicitly includes 'Dynamic Obstacle Negotiation' to protect the p95 target.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: The top-level system orchestrator that integrates vehicle dynamics, tasking, and safety protocols.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives cycle targets and site coordinates from the Site Manager.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Reports real-time cycle progress and performance KPIs.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Receives emergency stop or slowdown commands from Safety Services.

module_containment_scores.notes: Primary owner of the end-to-end mission logic.
Only handles physical execution; lacks mission-level cycle optimization.
Fallback module; not the primary driver for p95 efficiency.
Constraint provider, not a functional driver for cycle time.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: The NGHE Solution module provides the necessary abstraction to manage the interplay between vehicle speed and safety-rated slowdowns.
containment_risks: Logic diffusion if path planning is partially implemented in the Vehicle firmware.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Explicitly define the API between NGHE Solution and Vehicle to prevent logic leakage.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The Autonomous Path Planning DP directly addresses the efficiency requirements of the load-travel-dump cycle.

diffusion_risks: High risk of path-planning logic being split between NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: NGHE Solution is the correct high-level container for this level of decomposition.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: High; the NGHE Solution module can be tested in a HIL (Hardware-in-the-loop) environment.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation to the system-level orchestrator.

recommended_revisions: Define specific latency requirements for the Network Link interface to support the DP.

decision.justification: The high-level FR and DP are validated; however, the complexity of the load-travel-dump cycle requires further decomposition into sub-functions (Load, Travel, Dump) to assign specific DPs at the component level.

assumptions: Site conditions remain within specified parameters (grade, rolling resistance).
open_risks: Impact of SafetyAlert frequency on p95 cycle time.
evidence_needed: Simulation results showing path planning efficiency in congested sites.
